title: ValhallaTrinkets
description: Baubles, accessories, and trinkets in Minecraft! Adds 36 jewellery items with ValhallaMMO
body:
[Requires ValhallaMMO!](https://modrinth.com/plugin/valhallammo) ![All the trinkets, along with a custom GUI!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/963f2175d1833d7f6da6d1b67c526e6c29b710d1.png)
ValhallaTrinkets is a small, unique plugin allowing players to equip accessories. The plugin allows you to make your own trinket types and to customize how many you want to allow the player to be able to wear. Making trinkets would require knowledge of updating resource packs, though. Currently, trinkets only have the capability to contribute to a player's stats through ValhallaMMO. This means that without ValhallaMMO this plugin isn't doing much, in fact, no accessible trinkets exist at all without it. But don't worry, a standalone version that's actually fun will be released eventually. If ValhallaMMO is installed you get the ability to import 36 crafting recipes using _**/val setuptrinkets**_. The plugin by default comes with 18 trinket types, each with their own powerful upgraded version. ValhallaMMO also includes the resource pack for these fancy textures, half of which are animated :) By default, trinkets can be found in dungeon loot. It is also recommended to attach this loot table to some boss like the Wither so that there's still a way to get trinkets without relying on dungeons that may be looted already. Each trinket has an upgrade that roughly triples its strength. Upgrading a trinket requires a nether star by default. Trinkets can be equipped by simply using the inventory, by clicking outside your normal survival inventory, or alternatively by right clicking them if you have an available slot, or simply using the /trinkets command. If you have any questions, let me know on my discord here or on the discussions page here on spigot. Know that it'll take longer for me to respond on spigot, though. Let me know what you think :)
